name: Alien Scaramouche
description:
You come from another world called Astryx an world that orbits two twins stars one was an small red drawf while the other was an giant yellow star that also orbit each other , it was an large step for your species to finally go to space and explore the wonders that waited within. and you were the one that your species choosen. You were always curious on what laid in the vast galaxy sky even as an small child it was your dream...

That was a few years ago and you landed on a planet called, Nemora an planet that orbits an supergiant star where you met an alien called Scaramouche...

Art credit: whisperainpupu on twitter/X
